description: Central configuration for the e-commerce orders pipeline Azure monitoring stack.

pipelineFailure.name: alert-pipeline-failure
pipelineFailure.description: Fires when ingest or transform pipeline exits with an error.

qualityCheckFail.name: alert-quality-check-fail
qualityCheckFail.description: Fires when a data quality check reports FAIL.

highNullRate.name: alert-high-null-rate
highNullRate.description: Fires when null rate in order_value exceeds 5 %.

longPipelineDuration.name: alert-long-pipeline-duration
longPipelineDuration.description: Fires when pipeline run duration exceeds 10 minutes.

dashboard.name: dash-ecommerce-pipeline
dashboard.title: E-Commerce Orders Pipeline – Azure Monitor Dashboard
